company_description: 1031 Crowdfunding is an Irvine, California-based real estate investment platform founded in 2014 that specializes in 1031 exchange-eligible Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) investments. The platform helps investors defer capital gains taxes through tax-advantaged real estate investments, offering access to institutional-quality multifamily, industrial, and net-leased properties structured as DSTs.

apollo_org_data.name: 1031 Crowdfunding, LLC
keywords: securities and commodity contracts intermediation and brokerage
apollo_org_data.short_description:
1031 Crowdfunding, LLC is a real estate investment platform based in Irvine, California, specializing in 1031 exchange opportunities and tax-deferred investments. Founded in 2014 by Edward Fernandez, the company operates as a limited liability company and has a team of approximately 33 employees. It has been accredited by the Better Business Bureau with an A+ rating since 2015.

The platform serves as a marketplace for 1031 exchange investments, sourcing deals from third-party sponsors. It focuses on commercial real estate equity investments that allow investors to defer capital gains taxes by reinvesting proceeds from property sales into like-kind properties. Key offerings include single-property investments, multi-property funds, and Delaware Statutory Trusts (DSTs), emphasizing conservative investment strategies. Investments typically require minimums of $25,000 to $100,000, with platform fees ranging from 5% to over 9%. The company has completed over 1,500 exchange transactions and was recognized as the #1 Real Estate Crowdfunding Platform for 1031 Exchanges.

company_description: 52TEN is an Arizona-based investment firm specializing in stabilized mobile home parks in high-demand markets. Founded by Nate Pattee and Jack Martin, the company focuses on building portfolios that prioritize long-term value with reliable cash flow. 52TEN is known for consistent operations and a resident-friendly management approach.

apollo_org_data.name: 52TEN
keywords: lessors of residential buildings and dwellings
apollo_org_data.raw_address: 6424 E Greenway Pkwy, Scottsdale, Arizona 85254, US
apollo_org_data.short_description:
52TEN is a real estate investment firm based in Scottsdale, Arizona, founded in 2016 by Jack Martin and Nate Pattee. The company specializes in acquiring, repositioning, and managing mobile home parks and RV parks, focusing on delivering stable cash flow for qualified investors. With a team of fewer than 25 employees, 52TEN leverages over 84 years of combined real estate experience from its founders, who have a strong background in various aspects of real estate, including general contracting and capital management.

The firm partners with investors through private placements, forming Limited Partnerships for each offering. 52TEN targets high-demand affordable housing markets and employs a direct-to-owner approach for off-market acquisitions. Their investment strategy emphasizes risk management and operational enhancements to drive income and capital appreciation. The company provides comprehensive services for its portfolio, including asset management, property management, and construction management, ensuring a hands-on approach to maximizing property performance.

company_description: Based in San Francisco, CA. 7e Investments is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

apollo_org_data.name: 7e Investments
keywords: securities and commodity contracts intermediation and brokerage
apollo_org_data.short_description:
7e Investments, also known as Seveney Investments, is a Virginia-based private real estate investment firm founded in 2016 by Christopher Seveney. The company specializes in acquiring, managing, and renovating distressed residential mortgage notes secured by single-family homes across the United States. With over 25 years of real estate experience, the firm has managed more than 500 notes with an unpaid balance exceeding $25 million, and currently oversees around $75 million in assets across 42 states.

The firm offers investment opportunities through Regulation D Bond Offerings and General Mortgage Note Investments, targeting annualized preferred returns of 8-11%. 7e Investments focuses on working with borrowers to restore payments and keep families in their homes, while providing reliable income and diversification for investors. The company emphasizes transparency, disciplined asset management, and a commitment to borrower rehabilitation, with a track record of consistent distributions and no foreclosures or evictions reported.

apollo_org_data.short_description: ACCOUNTABLE EQUITY is an integrated development, management, and syndication company.  Our mission is to offer accredited investors access to some of the most compelling private offerings available today.  Our goal is to be accountable with the equity entrusted to our care by our investor partners.  We are committed to offering our investor partners a level of management and development expertise which is typically only available for the largest private equity offices. Today, the accredited investor is looking to participate in alternative investments which extend beyond publicly traded equities.  ACCOUNTABLE EQUITY is the partner of thoughtful accredited investors who can benefit from tax-advantaged investments and who seek a team of professionals who will be accountable with their investments in privately offered equities.

company_description: AcreTrader is a farmland investing platform that offers fractional ownership in U.S. farmland through a syndication-like structure. The platform provides accredited investors with passive exposure to agricultural real estate, one of the most stable asset classes historically. AcreTrader handles all aspects of farm management and operation.

apollo_org_data.name: AcreTrader
keywords: other activities related to real estate
apollo_org_data.raw_address: 26 West Center St., Floor 2, Fayetteville, Arkansas 72701, US
apollo_org_data.short_description:
AcreTrader is a real estate investing platform that allows individual investors to buy shares of farmland and earn passive income. Founded in 2018 and based in Fayetteville, Arkansas, AcreTrader aims to make farmland investment accessible by lowering traditional barriers. Investors can start with minimum investments as low as $1,000 through a user-friendly online portal.

The company offers a range of services to simplify the investment process. This includes a curated selection of farmland parcels, with less than 5% of those considered being listed after thorough evaluation. AcreTrader also manages all aspects of farmland ownership, such as insurance and working with local farmers, while utilizing data analytics to provide insights on farm sustainability. The platform targets individual investors looking for alternative asset classes, addressing challenges like high fees and limited liquidity. In August 2025, AcreTrader was acquired by Proterra Investment Partners, which aims to enhance the platform's offerings and expand its reach.

company_description: Based in Denver, CO. Aimco is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

apollo_org_data.name: Aimco
apollo_org_data.raw_address: 4582 S Ulster St, Suite 1450, Denver, Colorado 80237, US
apollo_org_data.short_description:
Aimco is a diversified real estate investment company with over 30 years of experience, primarily focused on the U.S. multifamily sector. The company emphasizes value-add, opportunistic, and alternative investments, concentrating on development, redevelopment, and stabilized properties to achieve total returns on a risk-adjusted basis. Founded in 1994 and headquartered in Denver, Colorado, and Washington, D.C., Aimco operates in key markets including Southeast Florida, the Washington D.C. Metro Area, and Colorado’s Front Range.

Aimco's investment strategy includes a balanced approach to capital allocation, targeting stabilized, cash-flowing apartment properties for steady income and development projects for higher returns. The company leverages local market expertise and a cohesive team to identify and execute investment opportunities. Aimco is committed to creating value for investors and communities, maintaining a strong balance sheet, and achieving high occupancy rates in its properties. Recent achievements include significant stockholder returns and a robust pipeline of development opportunities.

company_description: American Campus Communities was the largest developer, owner, and manager of high-quality student housing properties in the United States before being acquired by Blackstone in 2022 for $12.8 billion. The company managed 170+ properties with over 111,000 beds near top universities. ACC pioneered the institutional student housing market.

apollo_org_data.name: American Campus Communities
apollo_org_data.raw_address: 12700 Hill Country Blvd, Suite T-200, Austin, TX 78738, US
apollo_org_data.short_description:
American Campus Communities (ACC) is the largest developer, owner, and manager of high-quality student housing in the United States. Founded in 1993 and headquartered in Bee Cave, Texas, ACC specializes in both on-campus and off-campus properties near universities. The company operates as a self-managed equity real estate investment trust (REIT) and focuses on the design, finance, development, construction management, and operational management of student housing. ACC currently owns or manages over 166 properties, providing housing for more than 128,000 students across 90 campuses in 71+ university markets.

ACC emphasizes creating environments that support student thriving through healthy living, academic success, and professional development. The company has received several recognitions, including being named a Great Place to Work in 2023 and one of Newsweek's Most Trustworthy Companies from 2022 to 2024. ACC partners with numerous leading universities, including Arizona State University and the University of Texas at Austin, to deliver tailored housing solutions that meet student needs.

company_description: Americold Realty Trust is the world's largest publicly traded REIT focused on temperature-controlled warehouses. The company owns and operates over 245 temperature-controlled facilities globally totaling approximately 1.5 billion cubic feet. Americold serves food producers, food distributors, and grocery retailers with cold storage and logistics solutions.

apollo_org_data.name: Americold Logistics, LLC.
apollo_org_data.short_description:
Americold Logistics, LLC is a leading provider of temperature-controlled warehousing and logistics, headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. Founded in 1903, the company has established itself as the second largest provider in this sector globally. As a publicly traded Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) since 2018, Americold operates over 245 warehouses across six countries, including the United States, Australia, and Canada, with a total cold storage capacity exceeding 1 billion cubic feet.

The company offers a wide range of services tailored to the needs of the food and beverage industry. These include temperature-controlled warehousing, refrigerated transportation, and various value-added services such as blast freezing and inventory management. Americold also provides supply chain optimization and consulting services, supported by a fleet of nearly 4,500 material-handling vehicles. With a workforce of approximately 10,600 to 14,559 employees, Americold generated around $2.6 billion in revenue, connecting food producers and retailers to consumers efficiently.

company_description: Based in New York, NY. Angelo Gordon is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

apollo_org_data.name: TPG Angelo Gordon
apollo_org_data.raw_address: 245 Park Ave, New York, NY 10167, US
apollo_org_data.short_description:
TPG Angelo Gordon is a global alternative investment manager founded in 1988, specializing in credit and real estate strategies. Headquartered in New York City, the firm has expanded its operations to multiple international locations, including San Francisco, London, and Tokyo. It employs over 600 people, including more than 200 investment professionals, and manages approximately $104 billion in assets.

The firm focuses on four core disciplines: credit, real estate, private equity, and multi-strategy investments. Its credit strategies include structured credit and specialty finance, as well as middle-market direct lending through its subsidiary, Twin Brook Capital Partners. In real estate, TPG Angelo Gordon has a strong track record in value-added investments and net lease real estate, acquiring significant assets globally. The firm serves a diverse client base, including pension funds, corporations, and sovereign wealth funds, and is committed to delivering consistent returns through disciplined investment practices.
